narrative: US Navy repels Iranian attack in the Strait of Hormuz, introducing a geopolitical risk premium as WTI surges to $96.3; USD/JPY holds at 156.92 as 300bp Fed-BoJ carry offsets risk-premium demand. NZD/CAD bilateral divergence (1.083% spread) reflects RBNZ hike bias vs BoC hold; gold higher +0.30% near $4,725; equities -0.38%; DXY +0.18%; VIX 17.1. Watch RBNZ Rate Decision on May 27.
